mult_ln_val_storage: DIAGNOSIS: Renal cell carcinoma, clear cell type, Fuhrman/ISUP grade 2. Tumor 4.5 cm, confined to kidney (pT1b). Margins negative.
IMMUNOHISTOCHEMISTRY: Tumor cells positive for CD10, PAX8, CAIX, and vimentin. Negative for CK7. Findings support clear cell renal cell carcinoma.
GROSS: Received fresh, left radical nephrectomy specimen weighing 320 g.
SPECIMEN A (Left radical nephrectomy): Renal cell carcinoma, clear cell type, ISUP grade 3. Tumor 7.8 cm. Renal vein involved (pT3a). Margins negative.
SPECIMEN B (Hilar lymph node, biopsy): Metastatic renal cell carcinoma, clear cell type, 1 of 3 nodes involved (pN1).
SPECIMEN C (Ipsilateral adrenal gland, en-bloc resection): Benign adrenal cortex; no tumor involvement.
IMMUNOHISTOCHEMISTRY (Specimen B): Tumor cells positive for PAX8 and CD10, confirming renal origin of metastasis.
SPECIMEN A (Right kidney, partial nephrectomy): Chromophobe renal cell carcinoma, 3.2 cm, margins negative (pT1a).
SPECIMEN B (Left kidney mass, core biopsy): Renal oncocytoma, no features of malignancy identified.
IMMUNOHISTOCHEMISTRY: Specimen A positive for CK7 and CD117, negative for vimentin (supports chromophobe RCC). Specimen B CD117 positive, CK7 negative, vimentin negative (supports oncocytoma).
